name: TYPO3 MCP Server
what_it_does: TYPO3 CMS MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with TYPO3 — the enterprise-grade PHP content management system popular in Europe and Germany. Enables reading and managing TYPO3 content records, pages, and assets; interacting with TYPO3's data structures; and integrating AI assistance into TYPO3 development and content management workflows.
use_cases: Managing TYPO3 content records and pages from content management agents
Querying TYPO3 database records for content review from audit agents
Assisting with TYPO3 development and configuration from developer agents
Automating content updates across TYPO3 instances from operations agents
Building TYPO3 integration workflows from e-commerce and web platform agents
not_for: Teams not using TYPO3 CMS (use WordPress, Drupal, or Umbraco MCPs for those platforms)
TYPO3 beginners without understanding of its complex page tree and record system
best_when: A European enterprise development team using TYPO3 needs AI assistance managing complex content structures — TYPO3's powerful but complex system benefits from AI-assisted navigation.
avoid_when: You use WordPress, Drupal, or another CMS. TYPO3 is a niche CMS most popular in Germany and Europe.

auth.notes: TYPO3 API key or backend user credentials required. TYPO3 REST API must be configured. Configure credentials specific to your TYPO3 installation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: TYPO3 is free and open source; hosting costs apply
pricing.paid_tiers: TYPO3 Enterprise Edition and support contracts available
pricing.notes: TYPO3 is free open source. MCP server is free open source from hauptsacheNet (German TYPO3 agency). Hosting and support may have costs.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted — performance depends on server infrastructure

known_agent_gotchas: TYPO3's data model is complex (page tree, content elements, TypoScript) — steep learning curve
TYPO3 versions differ significantly — verify compatibility with your TYPO3 version
Documentation and community materials are heavily German-language — English resources exist but less abundant
TYPO3 has strict access controls — ensure backend user has appropriate record permissions
Community MCP from TYPO3 agency — quality is reasonable but niche user base
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. Backend user credentials. TYPO3 content may be sensitive. Self-hosted means controlled environment. GDPR compliance common in European TYPO3 deployments. Scope user permissions carefully.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Backend user auth. Self-hosted CMS content may be sensitive. GDPR context in European deployments. Scope permissions appropriately.
